chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 131 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For Orders as to non-prosecution of Reference. -------------- 13.02.2025. Matter is pending for non-prosecution since 2014; whereas, Mr. Ghulam Hyder Shaikh, Advocate present in Court submits that brief has already been returned. Be that as it may, since no one in attendance on behalf of the Applicant, this Reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
